Title: Verify the main dashboard displays carbon footprint data
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Navigate to the main dashboard
3. Verify that the carbon footprint data for various digital activities (email, cloud services, streaming, web navigation, battery consumption) is displayed
Expected Result: The carbon footprint data for various digital activities is correctly displayed

Title: Verify educational notifications are displayed
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Navigate to the main dashboard
3. Verify that educational notifications about reducing digital carbon footprint are displayed
Expected Result: Educational notifications about reducing digital carbon footprint are correctly displayed

Title: Verify gamification features are working correctly
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Navigate to the main dashboard
3. Verify that gamification features (badges, virtual rewards) are working correctly and encouraging users to reduce their digital carbon footprint
Expected Result: Gamification features are correctly working and encouraging users to reduce their digital carbon footprint

Title: Verify API integration with other software
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that the API is correctly integrated with other software (Google Drive, Discord, Whatsapp)
Expected Result: The API is correctly integrated with other software

Title: Verify background processing is working correctly
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that background processing is correctly working and updating carbon footprint data in the background
Expected Result: Background processing is correctly working and updating carbon footprint data in the background

Title: Verify Firebase database integration
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that Firebase database is correctly integrated and storing carbon footprint data
Expected Result: Firebase database is correctly integrated and storing carbon footprint data

Title: Verify compatibility with Android devices
Preconditions: User is using an Android device
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on an Android device
2. Verify that the application is correctly installed and running
Expected Result: The application is correctly installed and running on the Android device

Title: Verify compatibility with AWS services
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that the application is correctly using AWS services
Expected Result: The application is correctly using AWS services

Title: Verify Git integration for version control
Preconditions: Application is using Git for version control
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that Git is correctly integrated for version control
Expected Result: Git is correctly integrated for version control

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The app is installed on the user's device.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Enter the required details (username, email, password).
4. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is registered and can access the application's features.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the email and password.
4. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access the home screen.

Title: Visualizza Consigli Green
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the notification or the button in the toolbar.
2. Verify that a pop-up appears displaying a green tip.
Expected Result: Green tip is displayed.

Title: Ricevi Notifica Educativa
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the application sends a notification when a new green tip is available.
2. Tap on the notification.
3. Verify that the user is redirected to the application where the new green tip is displayed.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the application and the new green tip is displayed.

Title: Ricevi Notifica Traguardo Superato
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the application sends a notification when a user has reached a goal.
2. Tap on the notification.
3. Verify that the user is redirected to the application's goals page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the application's goals page.

Title: Visualizza Consumi Batteria
Test Steps:
1. Access the battery consumption page from the toolbar or the main screen.
2. Verify that the page displays information about the battery, such as its capacity and health.
3. Verify that the page also displays a summary of the device's energy consumption and an estimate of its environmental impact.
Expected Result: Information about the battery and energy consumption is displayed.

Title: Visualizza Consumi Rete
Preconditions: Device is connected to a network
Test Steps:
1. Access the network consumption page from the toolbar or the main screen.
2. Verify that the page displays the consumption of each application, both upload and download data, separated by mobile network or WiFi.
3. Verify that the page also shows the trend of the consumption compared to the last few days, in red if consumption is increased or in green otherwise.
Expected Result: Network consumption is displayed, including the trend of consumption.

Title: Visualizza Sfide ed Obiettivi
Test Steps:
1. Access the challenges and objectives page from the toolbar.
2. Verify that the page displays a series of daily and weekly challenges that reward the user with points to unlock unique badges.
Expected Result: Challenges and objectives are displayed.

Title: View User Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile page from the toolbar.
2. Verify that the user's profile information, such as username, email, and unlocked badges, is displayed.
Expected Result: User's profile information is correctly displayed.

Title: Collaboration Model
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the collaboration model for uTrace includes user registration and online profile storage for maintaining user statistics and progress over time, even when changing devices or reinstalling uTrace.
2. Verify that a ranking system is in place for creating challenges and periodic milestones based on optimizing digital consumption, with virtual points awarded for participation.
Expected Result: Collaboration model is correctly implemented.

Title: Permanent Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the application requires a data connection for monitoring digital resource usage and receiving real-time updates and notifications.
2. Verify that each user must have a profile to access personalized monitoring features and accumulate credits.
Expected Result: Permanent requirements are correctly implemented.

Title: Volatile Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Verify that temporary ecological challenges can be updated periodically to adapt to usage trends or new global objectives.
2. Verify that educational suggestions and notifications can be enriched with new sustainability information or digital practices.
Expected Result: Volatile requirements are correctly implemented.

Title: Functional Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the application provides a feature for monitoring the environmental impact of digital activities and displaying digital resource consumption and CO2 emissions.
2. Verify that the application sends periodic educational notifications with suggestions for reducing digital impact.
3. Verify that users can participate in weekly challenges to optimize their online activities.
4. Verify that the application generates weekly and monthly reports showing progress towards sustainability goals.
5. Verify that users can accumulate credits and badges based on achieved milestones and convert them into donations.
Expected Result: Functional requirements are correctly implemented.

Title: Non-Functional Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the application operates efficiently without causing significant slowdowns on the device.
2. Verify that the user interface is simple and intuitive for easy access to data and monitoring features.
3. Verify that the application can support a large number of users without compromising performance.
4. Verify that the application ensures user data security and privacy in compliance with privacy regulations.
Expected Result: Non-functional requirements are correctly implemented.

Title: Stakeholder Analysis
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the main stakeholders for the uTrace project include end users, developers, partner companies, university professors, and regulatory bodies.
2. Verify that stakeholder involvement is carried out through interviews, questionnaires, collaborative workshops, iterative revisions, analysis of regulations, and user testing.
Expected Result: Stakeholder analysis is correctly implemented.

Title: Update User Profile
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Log in with the registered email and password
3. Click on the "Profile" option
4. Click on the "Edit Profile" button
5. Enter new Email and Password in the respective fields
6. Click on the "Update" button
Expected Result: User profile is updated successfully

Title: Data Removal on Uninstall
Preconditions: The application is installed on an Android device.
Test Steps:
1. Uninstall the application from the device.
2. Check the device for any residual data left by the application.
Expected Result: All data should be completely removed from the device.

Title: Compliance with GDPR
Preconditions: The application is installed and running on an Android device.
Test Data: Sensitive user data (residence, email, phone number)
Test Steps:
1. Collect sensitive user data within the application.
2. Check if the data is stored and handled according to GDPR norms.
Expected Result: No violations of GDPR norms should occur.

Title: Compatibility with Android 8.1 or Higher
Test Data: Android devices with versions lower than 8.1
Test Steps: 1. Test the application on Android devices with versions lower than 8.1.
Expected Result: The application should not function properly or not at all on devices with versions lower than 8.1.

Title: Fast Response Times
Test Steps:
1. Perform various operations within the application.
2. Measure the response times for each operation.
Expected Result: Response times should be less than or equal to 500 milliseconds for all operations.

Title: Required Storage Space
Test Steps: 1. Check the required storage space for the complete installation of the application.
Expected Result: The required storage space should be approximately 300 MB.

Title: Intuitive User Interface
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application and interact with its various features.
2. Evaluate the overall user interface design for its cleanliness and intuitiveness.
Expected Result: The user interface should be clean and intuitive, making it easy for users to navigate and interact with the application.

Title: Meeting Delivery Deadlines
Test Steps: 1. Compare the actual delivery dates of the project deliverables with the deadlines set by the professor.
Expected Result: All deliverables should be delivered on or before their respective deadlines.

Title: Use of Predefined Programming Languages
Test Steps:
1. Analyze the code written for the project.
2. Check if the code is written in Java and XML, as per the project requirements.
Expected Result: All code should be written in Java and XML.

Title: Internet Connection Requirement
Test Steps: 1. Test the application without an internet connection.
Expected Result: The application should not function properly or not at all without an internet connection.

Title: Secure Data Transmission
Test Data: Sensitive user data (residence, email, phone number)
Test Steps:
1. Collect sensitive user data within the application.
2. Check if the data is transmitted securely using appropriate protocols.
Expected Result: All sensitive user data should be transmitted securely using appropriate protocols.

Title: Block Unauthorized Access Attempts
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to access the application or its data using unauthorized means.
2. Check if the unauthorized access attempts are blocked.
Expected Result: All unauthorized access attempts should be blocked.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The application is downloaded from the store and installed correctly on the phone.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Enter the sample user data.
4. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered, and they can navigate within the application.

Title: User Profile Update
Test Data: Sample updated user data (email, password, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user profile screen.
2. Select the "Edit Profile" option.
3. Update the sample user data.
4. Submit the profile update form.
Expected Result: The user's profile is updated with the new data.

Title: User Logout
Preconditions: User is connected to the application.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the logout button.
2. User is prompted to confirm the logout.
3. User confirms the logout.
Expected Result: User is no longer connected to the application.

Title: User Login with New Credentials
Preconditions: User is not connected to the application.
Test Steps:
1. User enters new credentials.
2. User clicks on the login button.
3. User is logged in with the new credentials.
Expected Result: User is connected to the application with the new credentials.

Title: Application Functionality with Internet Connection
Preconditions: User is connected to the application and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. User performs various tasks in the application.
2. User checks if the application functions correctly.
Expected Result: Application functions correctly with internet connection.

Title: Application Functionality without Internet Connection
Preconditions: User is connected to the application and does not have internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. User performs various tasks in the application.
2. User checks if the application functions correctly.
Expected Result: Application functions correctly without internet connection, but some features may be limited or unavailable.

Title: Application Functionality with GPS
Preconditions: User is connected to the application and has GPS enabled.
Test Steps:
1. User performs various tasks in the application that require GPS.
2. User checks if the application functions correctly with GPS.
Expected Result: Application functions correctly with GPS.

Title: Application Functionality without GPS
Preconditions: User is connected to the application and has GPS disabled.
Test Steps:
1. User performs various tasks in the application that require GPS.
2. User checks if the application functions correctly without GPS.
Expected Result: Application functions correctly without GPS, but some features may be limited or unavailable.

Title: Application Functionality with Low RAM
Preconditions: User is connected to the application and has less than 1 GB of RAM.
Test Steps:
1. User performs various tasks in the application.
2. User checks if the application functions correctly with low RAM.
Expected Result: Application functions correctly with low RAM, but performance may be slower.

Title: Application Functionality with Low Storage Space
Preconditions: User is connected to the application and has less than 300 MB of free storage space.
Test Steps:
1. User performs various tasks in the application.
2. User checks if the application functions correctly with low storage space.
Expected Result: Application functions correctly with low storage space, but some features may be limited or unavailable.
